title: THE WORKERS' ULTIMATUM
description: Public transport workers have announced a city-wide strike. They demand higher wages and safer working conditions before morning.

choices.outcome: The strike is cancelled. Workers celebrate, but the agreement creates a serious gap in the city budget.

choices.text: Offer a smaller pay increase and begin negotiations.
choices.outcome: Union leaders agree to delay the strike for forty-eight hours. You have gained time, but no permanent solution.

choices.text: Declare the strike unlawful and order workers back to work.
choices.outcome: Some workers return, but thousands gather outside the government offices. Tension spreads throughout the city.
